message:
fix(connectors): fix Slack import path and increase Anthropic retry budget

slack/error.rs:
- Fix ConnectorErrorMapping impl to use fcp_sdk::migration::ConnectorErrorMapping
  (was incorrectly using fcp_sdk::ConnectorErrorMapping which doesn't exist)
- Refactor tests to use a from_async() helper and fully qualified trait
  paths, eliminating repeated use imports

anthropic/client.rs:
- Increase ExecutionContext timeout from 120s to 300s to accommodate
  Anthropic 529 responses with 60s retry_after across up to 3 retries
  (3×60s + request time requires >180s budget)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
